/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Toolchains/XcodeDefault.xctoolchain/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -isysroot /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX14.5.sdk -mmacosx-version-min=14.3 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/pokemoncollection_sim.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pokemoncollection_sim.dir/SimSd.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pokemoncollection_sim.dir/LgfxSpriteShim.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pokemoncollection_sim.dir/M5RendererShim.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pokemoncollection_sim.dir/Users/mn/Documents/PlatformIO/Projects/PokemonCollection/src/PcRenderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pokemoncollection_sim.dir/Users/mn/Documents/PlatformIO/Projects/PokemonCollection/src/DataManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pokemoncollection_sim.dir/Users/mn/Documents/PlatformIO/Projects/PokemonCollection/src/ImageLoader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pokemoncollection_sim.dir/Users/mn/Documents/PlatformIO/Projects/PokemonCollection/src/UIController.cpp.o -o pokemoncollection_sim  /opt/homebrew/Cellar/sdl2_ttf/2.24.0/lib/libSDL2_ttf.dylib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/sdl2_image/2.8.10/lib/libSDL2_image.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libSDL2.dylib
